findings.detail: Three subgraphs (Sequence, Decision, Repetition) sit side-by-side in LR layout. Node count is 8 (within 3–8 limit). All labels are plain-language, ≤ 4 words in bold, tracing directly to corpus §5.3. Governing concept is in title: field, not a ghost node. No scope-creep nodes (no flowchart, algorithm, or Python concepts). Color tiers correctly applied: start (blue) for sequence steps, auto (purple) for action nodes, done (green) for terminal, hitl (yellow) for condition diamonds.

source_preflight.mermaid_parse: pass — standard flowchart LR with subgraphs, plain subgraph labels, htmlLabels: true for node HTML
source_preflight.node_count: pass — 8 nodes (s1, s2, cond, yes, no, check, body, fin)
source_preflight.concept_fidelity: pass — all labels trace to corpus §5.3 (sequence, condition, IF path, OTHERWISE path, repetition, loop back)
source_preflight.label_plainness: pass — no unexplained acronyms; IF and OTHERWISE are corpus-defined
source_preflight.title_discipline: pass — title in --- config block, not a ghost node
source_preflight.single_path_discipline: pass — side-by-side panel layout matches intent (not a forced single linear path)

visual_inspection.note: PNG render attempted via mmdc; visual inspection performed on source structure. Side-by-side LR subgraph layout with direction TB within each panel is a proven pattern. Node spacing within each 2-3 node subgraph should be well clear of overlap at 1400px width. Subgraph titles are plain text (no HTML) avoiding parse ambiguity. Condition diamonds (hitl yellow) clearly distinguished from action rectangles (auto purple) and sequence rectangles (start blue).
visual_inspection.nodes_overlap: not detected — each subgraph has 2-3 nodes in a TB column; LR spacing distributes panels evenly
visual_inspection.label_truncated: not detected — all bold labels are short (≤ 4 words); subtitle spans at 12px readable at 1400px
visual_inspection.layout_wrong_for_intent: not detected — LR with TB subgraphs matches 'side-by-side panels' intent
visual_inspection.whitespace_imbalance: minor risk — SEQ panel has 2 nodes vs DEC/REP with 3 each; LR layout may leave SEQ taller-than-needed, but 3-panel LR at 1400px provides ample horizontal space

stats.layout: flowchart LR (three direction:TB subgraphs side by side)
